name: CoAsia Electronics Corp.
summary: CoAsia Electronics Corp. provides components for mobile multimedia in Taiwan and internationally. It offers CMOS, 3D, and automotive image sensors; processors, PMICs, and NFC components; memory solutions; mobile and IT AMOLEDs; and balanced membrane drivers, chip solutions, driver IC's, and battery protection circuit packages, as well as micro controller units for remote controllers, small home application, and LCD applications. The company was formerly known as CoAsia Microelectronics Corp. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
